formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}\Delta_{k l l^{'}}^{R} & = & A r r_{k}^{l^{'}} - A r r_{k}^{l} - T r a_{k}^{l l^{'}} \\ & = & \left(t_{l^{'}}^{R} + \sum_{s = 1}^{k} t_{\left(s - 1\right) s}^{l^{'}} + \sum_{s = 0}^{k - 1} t_{s}^{l^{'}} \right) \\ & & - \left(t_{l}^{R} + \sum_{s = 1}^{k} t_{\left(s - 1\right) s}^{l} + \sum_{s = 0}^{k - 1} t_{s}^{l}\right) - T r a_{k}^{l l^{'}}\end{aligned}

formulas.latex: \begin{cases} \pi_{1} = \frac{1}{2} \left(\frac{^{1} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \underset{1 \leq u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{1 < u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)}\right) \\ \pi_{h} = \frac{1}{2} \left(\right. \underset{1 \leq u \leq h}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{1 \leq u < h}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \underset{h \leq u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \\ - \underset{h < u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \left.\right) , 2 \leq h \leq m - 1 \\ \pi_{m} = \frac{1}{2} \left(\underset{1 \leq u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{1 \leq u < m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \frac{^{m} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)}\right) \end{cases}

formulas.latex: 2 \cdot \sum_{h = 1}^{m} \pi_{h} = \begin{pmatrix} 2 \cdot \underset{1 \leq u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \frac{^{1} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{1 < u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \\ + \underset{1 \leq u \leq 2}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{1 \leq u < 2}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \underset{2 \leq u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \\ - \underset{2 < u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \underset{1 \leq u \leq 3}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{1 \leq u < 3}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \\ + \underset{3 \leq u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{3 < u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \hdots + \\ + \underset{1 \leq u \leq m - 1}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{1 \leq u < m - 1}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \\ + \underset{m - 1 \leq u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} - \underset{m - 1 < u \leq m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \\ - \underset{1 \leq u < m}{max} \frac{^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} + \frac{^{m} \mu_{s}^{l}}{\underset{u}{max} \left(^{u} \mu_{s}^{l}\right)} \end{pmatrix}

formulas.label: eqn0048
formulas.latex: \begin{aligned}O b j . \left(43\right) & \Rightarrow & \text{Max} \underset{\forall l \in L}{\sum} \underset{\forall l^{'} \in L}{\sum} \underset{k \in S \left(l\right) \cap S \left(l^{'}\right)}{\sum} p_{l l^{'}}^{k} \cdot x_{l l^{'}}^{k} \\ & & + \underset{\forall l \in L}{\sum} \underset{\forall l^{'} \in L}{\sum} \underset{\forall i \in S \left(l\right)}{\sum} \underset{\forall j \in S \left(l^{'}\right)}{\sum} \alpha_{l l^{'}}^{i j} \cdot p_{l l^{'}}^{i j} \\ & & \text{Min} \underset{i \in S \left(l\right)}{\sum} \underset{j \in S \left(l^{'}\right)}{\sum} \underset{\forall l \in L}{\sum} \underset{\forall l^{'} \in L}{\sum} p_{l l^{'}}^{i j} \\ & & \cdot \left[t_{i j}^{B \star} + \Delta_{i j}^{B} - A r r_{i}^{l} - T r a_{i}^{\text{RB}}\right]\end{aligned}
